who: procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10-50 invoices/month
offer: For procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10-50 invoices/month, inefficient tracking of spending causes missed discounts. We provide a procurement analytics dashboard instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
problem: Inability to effectively track spending trends and identify cost-saving opportunities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement teams
Indie Hackers posts about procurement workflows
DM outreach to procurement teams with demo video
try_it: Let users try spending trend visualization and alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
